title: Player Mobs
description: Adds hostile mobs that looks like players, works with remote list like Twitch subs
body:
A mod that adds hostile player mobs to the game.

You can add names to the config for more more names in game.
You can also add links to pages returning a list of names divided by a newline.
You can use pages like this [whitelist.gorymoon.se](https://whitelist.gorymoon.se) to get lists of twitch subs.

When used on a server you can add the whitelist the the available names for the mobs.
The mobs can be friendly to players with the same name as them.
The mobs can drop the heads of the skin they have.

Players can drop their head when killed based on a config option.

To manually reload the list of remote names the following commmand can be used:
**_/playermobs reload_**

To manually spawn a mob there is the following command:
**_/playermobs spawn <name> [pos]_** (where **pos** is optional)

This is an example on how to spawn a mod with the summon command:
**_/summon player_mobs:player_mob ~ ~ ~ {"Username":"Gory_Moon"}_**

## Custom skin textures

More info about adding/overriding textures of the player mobs can be found [here](https://github.com/GoryMoon/PlayerMobs/wiki/Custom-player-mob-skins)

## TODO/Next
Adding datapack support for special spawns.

## Bugs/Ideas/Requests?
Post bugs/ideas/requests on my Github issue tracker.

## Modpacks?
You are free to use this mod in modpacks.)
